controls.title: Risk Assessment Program
controls.rationale: Establish processes to identify and analyze cybersecurity risks
controls.recommendation: Implement annual risk assessments with documented mitigation strategies

controls.title: Inventory of Hardware
controls.rationale: Maintain inventory of computing devices
controls.recommendation: Document all hardware assets with location and ownership

controls.title: Access Control Policy
controls.rationale: Enforce approved access and authorization policies
controls.recommendation: Implement role-based access control with least privilege

controls.title: Remote Access Management
controls.rationale: Manage remote access and VPN configurations
controls.recommendation: Require MFA and device compliance for remote access

controls.title: Access Restrictions
controls.rationale: Restrict access to systems and information
controls.recommendation: Implement just-in-time access and privilege elevation

controls.title: Data Security Measures
controls.rationale: Protect data at rest with encryption
controls.recommendation: Enable encryption for all storage with managed key access

controls.title: Data in Transit Protection
controls.rationale: Protect data in transit with encryption
controls.recommendation: Use TLS 1.2+ for all communications

controls.title: Personnel Security
controls.rationale: Screen and manage workforce security
controls.recommendation: Conduct background checks and security training

controls.title: Protective Technology Deployment
controls.rationale: Deploy protective technologies including anti-malware
controls.recommendation: Enable Azure Defender and endpoint protection

controls.title: Audit Logging
controls.rationale: Implement audit logging for system activities
controls.recommendation: Enable comprehensive audit logging with 90-day retention

controls.title: Event Detection and Analysis
controls.rationale: Detect and analyze suspicious events
controls.recommendation: Configure alerts for security events with 24/7 monitoring

controls.title: Incident Response Planning
controls.rationale: Establish incident response procedures
controls.recommendation: Document procedures with roles, responsibilities, and communication plans

controls.title: Incident Analysis
controls.rationale: Analyze incidents to understand impact
controls.recommendation: Perform root cause analysis and document findings

controls.title: Recovery Planning
controls.rationale: Establish recovery objectives and plans
controls.recommendation: Define RTO/RPO with tested backup and restore procedures

controls.title: Recovery Implementation
controls.rationale: Execute recovery plans to restore functionality
controls.recommendation: Test recovery procedures quarterly with full restoration validation

controls.title: Governance Framework
controls.rationale: Establish cybersecurity governance structure
controls.recommendation: Define roles, responsibilities, and accountability structures

controls.title: Risk Strategy
controls.rationale: Develop risk management strategy
controls.recommendation: Document risk tolerance and response strategies

controls.title: Maintenance Schedule
controls.rationale: Maintain systems and equipment
controls.recommendation: Establish maintenance schedule with patching procedures

controls.title: Update and Patch Management
controls.rationale: Manage system updates and patches
controls.recommendation: Apply security patches within 30 days of release

controls.title: Supply Chain Risk Management
controls.rationale: Identify and manage supply chain risks
controls.recommendation: Assess third-party security controls and compliance

controls.title: Response Planning
controls.rationale: NIST CSF requires incident response planning with detection capabilities.
controls.recommendation: Enable Defender for Cloud and configure alert rules.

controls.title: Response Communications
controls.rationale: Response communications must notify stakeholders of incidents.
controls.recommendation: Configure action groups with email and SMS notification.

controls.title: Security Contact Coordination
controls.rationale: Security contacts must be established for incident coordination.
controls.recommendation: Configure security contacts with alert notifications.

controls.title: Investigation and Forensics
controls.rationale: Investigation infrastructure must support forensic analysis.
controls.recommendation: Deploy Log Analytics and configure diagnostic settings.

controls.title: Configuration Change Control
controls.rationale: Configuration change control processes must be established.
controls.recommendation: Assign policies with deny effects for change control.

controls.title: Backups
controls.rationale: Backups of information are conducted and tested.
controls.recommendation: Deploy Recovery Services vaults with soft delete.

controls.title: Vulnerability and Availability Management
controls.rationale: VM availability must be ensured through availability zones or sets.
controls.recommendation: Deploy VMs in availability zones or sets.

controls.title: Physical Devices and Systems Inventory
controls.rationale: Inventory of physical devices and systems within the organization.
controls.recommendation: Maintain comprehensive resource inventory.

controls.title: Software Platform and Application Inventory
controls.rationale: Software platforms and applications must be inventoried.
controls.recommendation: Review app registrations and ensure service principal ownership.
